description_en: Montevideo may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 7 halal restaurants and several mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Montevideo, Uruguay, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Montevideo: 7+ halal restaurants, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
